title: Subclasses of scikit-learn's BaseEstimator should not set attributes ending with '_in_' in the init method
description: This rule checks if subclasses of scikit-learn's BaseEstimator set attributes ending with '_in_' in the init method. This is a violation of the scikit-learn API design guidelines.
message: Avoid setting attributes ending with '_in_' in the init method of subclasses of scikit-learn's BaseEstimator.

noncompliant.description: Subclass of BaseEstimator setting attribute ending with '_in_' in init method

compliant.description: Subclass of BaseEstimator setting attribute without '_in_' in init method

why_is_this_an_issue: Setting attributes ending with '_in_' in the init method of subclasses of scikit-learn's BaseEstimator may lead to inconsistent behavior and violate API design guidelines.
how_to_fix: Rename attributes without '_in_' or use setters and getters instead of directly setting attributes in the init method.

metadata.title: Subclasses of scikit-learn's BaseEstimator should not set attributes ending with '_in_' in the init method
